requirement_topic.en: NEA Mandatory Energy Label — Tick Rating System for Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: NEA强制能效标签——空调器与热泵星级评定制度
requirement_topic.zht: NEA強制能效標籤——空調器與熱泵星級評定制度

summary.en: Singapore's NEA mandates an energy label displaying a tick rating (1 to 5 ticks, where 5 is most efficient) on all registered air conditioners and heat pump appliances sold in Singapore. The label must display the product's annual energy consumption (kWh/year) and the tick rating derived from the Seasonal Energy Efficiency Ratio (SEER) or equivalent metric as specified by NEA. The energy label requirement is separate from, but linked to, the NEA Controlled Goods registration — the label data is declared at registration and must match the product sold. Labels must be affixed visibly before or at point of sale.
summary.zh: 新加坡NEA强制要求在新加坡销售的所有已注册空调器和热泵电器上张贴能效标签，显示星级评定（1至5星，5星为最高效）。标签须显示产品年耗电量（kWh/年）及依据NEA规定的季节能效比（SEER）或等效指标所得出的星级。能效标签要求与NEA受管制商品注册相互独立但紧密关联——标签数据在注册时申报，须与销售产品一致。标签须在销售前或销售时在显眼位置粘贴。
summary.zht: 新加坡NEA強制要求在新加坡銷售的所有已註冊空調器和熱泵電器上張貼能效標籤，顯示星級評定（1至5星，5星為最高效）。標籤須顯示產品年耗電量（kWh/年）及依據NEA規定的季節能效比（SEER）或等效指標所得出的星級。能效標籤要求與NEA受管制商品註冊相互獨立但緊密關聯——標籤數據在註冊時申報，須與銷售產品一致。標籤須在銷售前或銷售時在顯眼位置黏貼。

standards_or_laws: Energy Conservation Act (Singapore) — mandatory energy labelling provisions
NEA Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme (MELS) — air conditioners
SS 530: 2014 — Energy labelling of household appliances
NEA tick rating methodology for SEER-based classification

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency label (中国能效标识) for room air conditioners is administered by MIIT / SAMR under GB 12021.3. The label uses a 1–5 grade scale (grade 1 is most efficient, grade 5 is minimum threshold). The Chinese label scheme uses different test conditions (GB/T 7725), rating methodology, and grade thresholds from NEA's tick system, and is not accepted for Singapore's MELS compliance.
summary.zh: 中国家用空调器强制能效标识（中国能效标识）由工业和信息化部/市场监督管理总局依据GB 12021.3实施。标识采用1–5级评分（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）。中国标识方案与NEA星级制度在测试条件（GB/T 7725）、评级方法和等级门槛方面均不同，不被新加坡MELS合规接受。
summary.zht: 中國家用空調器強制能效標識（中國能效標識）由工業和資訊化部/市場監督管理總局依據GB 12021.3實施。標識採用1–5級評分（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）。中國標識方案與NEA星級制度在測試條件（GB/T 7725）、評級方法和等級門檻方面均不同，不被新加坡MELS合規接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.3 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners
China mandatory energy efficiency label (中国能效标识) scheme

gap.en: China's energy efficiency label (1–5 grade, GB 12021.3) uses different test standards, rating metrics, and grade boundaries than Singapore's NEA tick system (1–5 ticks, SEER-based, SS 530). Chinese exporters must retest or recalculate the SEER value per NEA methodology using Singapore test conditions (230 V, 50 Hz, tropical climate assumptions) and obtain a valid NEA tick rating before the product may be labelled and sold in Singapore. The Chinese label must not appear as the primary label on Singapore-market products.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识（1–5级，GB 12021.3）与新加坡NEA星级制度（1–5星，基于SEER，SS 530）在测试标准、评级指标和等级边界上均不同。中国出口商须依据NEA方法论、按新加坡测试条件（230V、50Hz、热带气候假设）重新测试或重新计算SEER值，在新加坡销售前取得有效NEA星级评定。中国标识不得作为新加坡市场产品的主要标签显示。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識（1–5級，GB 12021.3）與新加坡NEA星級制度（1–5星，基於SEER，SS 530）在測試標準、評級指標和等級邊界上均不同。中國出口商須依據NEA方法論、按新加坡測試條件（230V、50Hz、熱帶氣候假設）重新測試或重新計算SEER值，在新加坡銷售前取得有效NEA星級評定。中國標識不得作為新加坡市場產品的主要標籤顯示。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for covered air conditioners and heat pump appliances sold in Singapore
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered room air conditioners sold in China; not equivalent to Singapore NEA tick label

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — Singapore NEA tick label (SEER-based, SS 530) is mandatory and is not satisfied by China's GB 12021.3 energy efficiency label; re-testing to NEA methodology required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——新加坡NEA星级标签（基于SEER，SS 530）为强制要求，中国GB 12021.3能效标识不满足该要求；须按NEA方法论重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——新加坡NEA星級標籤（基於SEER，SS 530）為強制要求，中國GB 12021.3能效標識不滿足該要求；須按NEA方法論重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: EMA Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for Air Conditioners and Heat Pump Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: EMA空调器与热泵电器最低能效标准（MEPS）
requirement_topic.zht: EMA空調器與熱泵電器最低能效標準（MEPS）

summary.en: Singapore's Energy Market Authority (EMA), in coordination with NEA, sets Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for covered categories including air conditioners and heat pump appliances. Products that do not meet the applicable MEPS threshold may not be imported or sold in Singapore regardless of NEA Controlled Goods registration status. MEPS thresholds are expressed as minimum SEER or Cooling Seasonal Performance Factor (CSPF) values and are periodically tightened. Compliance with MEPS is verified at the NEA registration stage using accredited laboratory test data.
summary.zh: 新加坡能源市场局（EMA）与NEA协同，为包括空调器和热泵电器在内的覆盖品类设定最低能效标准（MEPS）。不符合适用MEPS门槛的产品无论NEA受管制商品注册状态如何，均不得在新加坡进口或销售。MEPS门槛以最低SEER或制冷季节性能系数（CSPF）值表示，并定期提高。MEPS合规在NEA注册阶段通过认可实验室测试数据核验。
summary.zht: 新加坡能源市場局（EMA）與NEA協同，為包括空調器和熱泵電器在內的覆蓋品類設定最低能效標準（MEPS）。不符合適用MEPS門檻的產品無論NEA受管制商品註冊狀態如何，均不得在新加坡進口或銷售。MEPS門檻以最低SEER或製冷季節性能係數（CSPF）值表示，並定期提高。MEPS合規在NEA註冊階段通過認可實驗室測試數據核驗。

standards_or_laws: EMA MEPS for air conditioners (periodically updated thresholds)
NEA registration requirements incorporating MEPS verification

summary.en: China's GB 21455 sets minimum energy efficiency requirements for room air conditioners, with tiered grades under the COP/SCOP-based GB 12021.3 labelling standard. China MEPS (grade 5 or minimum threshold under GB 21455) apply to domestic market products and use Chinese test conditions under GB/T 7725. These thresholds and test conditions differ materially from Singapore EMA MEPS based on SEER/CSPF under tropical conditions.
summary.zh: 中国GB 21455为房间空调器设定最低能效要求，与基于COP/SCOP的GB 12021.3标识标准的分级制度相对应。中国MEPS（GB 21455下的5级或最低门槛）适用于国内市场产品，采用GB/T 7725规定的中国测试条件。这些门槛和测试条件与基于热带条件下SEER/CSPF的新加坡EMA MEPS存在实质性差异。
summary.zht: 中國GB 21455為房間空調器設定最低能效要求，與基於COP/SCOP的GB 12021.3標識標準的分級制度相對應。中國MEPS（GB 21455下的5級或最低門檻）適用於國內市場產品，採用GB/T 7725規定的中國測試條件。這些門檻和測試條件與基於熱帶條件下SEER/CSPF的新加坡EMA MEPS存在實質性差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners
GB 25454 — Heat pump water heaters for hot water supply

gap.en: China GB 21455 MEPS compliance does not satisfy Singapore EMA MEPS. The SEER/CSPF values required by Singapore EMA must be demonstrated using NEA-accepted test methodology under Singapore-representative conditions. Products meeting China minimum efficiency may nonetheless fail Singapore MEPS; exporters must verify the specific EMA threshold applicable to the product category, capacity range, and refrigerant type before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国GB 21455 MEPS合规不满足新加坡EMA MEPS要求。新加坡EMA要求的SEER/CSPF值须通过NEA认可的测试方法在代表新加坡条件下证明。满足中国最低能效的产品仍可能不符合新加坡MEPS；出口商须在出货前核验适用于该产品品类、容量范围和制冷剂类型的具体EMA门槛。
gap.zht: 中國GB 21455 MEPS合規不滿足新加坡EMA MEPS要求。新加坡EMA要求的SEER/CSPF值須通過NEA認可的測試方法在代表新加坡條件下證明。滿足中國最低能效的產品仍可能不符合新加坡MEPS；出口商須在出貨前核驗適用於該產品品類、容量範圍和製冷劑類型的具體EMA門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products not meeting EMA MEPS may not be imported or sold in Singapore
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic-market products under GB 21455; not equivalent to Singapore EMA MEPS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — EMA MEPS (SEER/CSPF-based, Singapore tropical conditions) are mandatory and are not satisfied by China GB 21455 MEPS; re-testing and EMA threshold verification required before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——EMA MEPS（基于SEER/CSPF，新加坡热带条件）为强制要求，中国GB 21455 MEPS不满足该要求；进口前须重新测试并核验EMA门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——EMA MEPS（基於SEER/CSPF，新加坡熱帶條件）為強制要求，中國GB 21455 MEPS不滿足該要求；進口前須重新測試並核驗EMA門檻。
